name: Postico
description: Postico is a modern, native PostgreSQL client for macOS. It provides a clean interface for browsing tables, running queries, editing data, and managing database schemas with support for multiple connections.

sparkle.note: UNCERTAINTY: This URL is the likely appcast for Postico 2 (stable channel). The exact URL is embedded in the app bundle's SUFeedURL and should be verified by inspecting the bundle. There are two update channels: stable (channel 2) and dev (channel 1).

changelog.channel_note: Stable channel uses update_channel=2. Dev channel uses update_channel=1.

release_date.note: UNCERTAINTY: The changelog page lists per-version release dates (e.g., 'Version X.Y.Z - Month Day, Year'). Date must be scraped from the HTML. The Sparkle appcast pubDate (if accessible) is a cleaner source.

notes: Paid app. Two update channels: stable (channel ID 2) and dev/pre-release (channel ID 1). UNCERTAINTIES: The appcast URL is likely but not confirmed — if Postico uses a different host or path, this will need adjustment. The download URL redirect pattern may require a specific User-Agent. The changelog page format could change. Inspecting the app bundle's SUFeedURL is the definitive way to confirm the Sparkle feed URL.
